opinion.h: GREEN v. CITY OF STUART, 302 U.S. 744 (1937)
George W. GREEN, petitioner, v. The CITY OF STUART.* No. 480.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. T. T. Oughterson, of Stuart, Fla., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 779, 58 S. Ct. 280, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Green v. City of Stuart 302 U.S. 744 (1937) ]
